summary: Night Safety Guardian (Phase 34) testing complete. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: simulation controls work, status panel shows all metrics (Risk, Score, ETA, Zone, Speed, Duration, Distance), map displays with location marker, sessions table shows active sessions, escalation badge displays correct levels.

issues: Minor HTML nesting warning: <tr> inside <span> in sessions table - React hydration warning but no functional impact

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/night-guardian/start creates active session with initial zone check - returns guardian_active, user_id, is_night, initial_zone, destination
POST /api/night-guardian/stop ends session and returns summary (duration_minutes, total_distance_m, alerts_triggered, final_zone)
GET /api/night-guardian/status returns full session state (zone, speed, ETA, alerts, escalation_level, safety_check_pending)
GET /api/night-guardian/sessions returns all active sessions (operator-only, properly enforces role check)
POST /api/night-guardian/update-location processes movement, checks zone, returns alerts if zone escalation
Zone escalation alert mapping: SAFE→NONE, LOW→NONE, HIGH→USER, CRITICAL→GUARDIAN per RISK_ALERT_MAP
Same zone repeated update does NOT generate new zone_escalation alerts (correctly implemented)
Idle detection: speed<0.5m/s triggers idle state, after 120s triggers safety_check_pending
ETA calculation works when destination is set and user is moving (returns null if speed too low)
POST /api/night-guardian/acknowledge-safety clears safety_check_pending and de-escalates from EMERGENCY
Frontend NightGuardianDashboard renders all components with proper data-testid attributes
Simulation flow works: Start Guardian → Step movement → Status updates → Stop with summary toast
Escalation badge shows correct level (Normal when none, User Alert for HIGH zone, Guardian Alert for CRITICAL)
Map shows user location marker with blue dot, destination marker with red square, location history trail
Active sessions summary shows correct counts (Active/Critical/Deviated/Idle)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use simulation user 'pytest-night-user' and 'sim-night-user' which are cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Night Guardian fully functional. API endpoints at /api/night-guardian/{start,stop,status,sessions,update-location,acknowledge-safety}. Frontend dashboard at /operator/night-guardian. Data-testids: night-guardian-dashboard, ng-sim-start, ng-sim-stop, ng-sim-step, ng-status-panel, ng-map, ng-alerts-panel, ng-sessions-table, ng-active-badge, ng-escalation-badge, ng-sessions-summary, ng-refresh. In-memory session store (MOCKED - no persistence). Built on Safe Zone Engine (Phase 33) for zone checking.

mocked_apis.session_store: In-memory Python dict (_sessions) - MOCKED, no database persistence
mocked_apis.redis_cache: In-memory dict for zone caching - MOCKED

backend_api_tests: Authentication required for /start (401/403 without auth)
Authentication required for /sessions (401/403 without auth)
Authentication required for /status (401/403 without auth)
POST /start creates active session with guardian_active=true
POST /start returns initial_zone with zone_id, risk_level, risk_score, zone_name
POST /start with destination returns destination info
POST /start without destination is allowed (destination=null)
POST /stop returns summary with duration_minutes, total_distance_m, alerts_triggered, final_zone
POST /stop for non-existent session returns message 'No active session'
GET /status returns full session state (19 fields including zone, speed, ETA, escalation)
GET /status for non-existent session returns active=false
GET /sessions requires operator role
GET /sessions returns list of active sessions with all fields
POST /update-location processes movement and returns zone, speed, alerts
POST /update-location checks zone and returns risk_level, risk_score
POST /update-location returns 404 for non-existent session
Zone escalation from LOW→HIGH triggers alert in response
Same zone repeated update generates no new zone_escalation alerts
ETA calculation returns eta_minutes when destination set and moving
POST /acknowledge-safety clears safety_check_pending
POST /acknowledge-safety returns 404 for non-existent session
Escalation level is one of: none, user, guardian, emergency
Low speed update tracks is_idle and idle_duration_s
Full journey flow: start→updates→stop with accumulated distance and updates
frontend_ui_tests: Sessions summary section present (data-testid=ng-sessions-summary) with 4 cards
Simulation controls present: Start Guardian, Stop buttons
Map section renders (data-testid=ng-map) with Leaflet and CartoDB tiles
Escalation Levels legend shows Normal, User Alert, Guardian Alert, Emergency
Start Guardian button triggers session start
Status panel appears with Risk (SAFE), Score, ETA, Zone, Speed, Duration, Distance, Updates
Simulate Movement step button works, updates step count
Active sessions table appears (data-testid=ng-sessions-table) with sim-night-user
Stop button ends session, removes MONITORING badge, shows summary toast

verified_features: POST /api/night-guardian/start creates active session with initial zone check
POST /api/night-guardian/stop ends session and returns summary (duration, distance, alerts)
GET /api/night-guardian/status returns full session state (zone, speed, ETA, alerts, escalation)
POST /api/night-guardian/update-location processes movement, checks zone, detects escalation
Zone escalation alert: LOW→HIGH triggers user alert, HIGH→CRITICAL triggers guardian alert
Same zone repeated update = no new alert
Idle detection: speed<0.5m/s triggers idle state
ETA calculation when destination is set
Frontend NightGuardianDashboard renders: simulation controls, status panel, map, sessions table
Frontend simulation flow: Start → Step movement → View status → Stop
Escalation badge shows correct level (Normal/User Alert/Guardian Alert/Emergency)
Map shows user location marker and escalation levels legend
Active sessions summary shows correct counts (Active/Critical/Deviated/Idle)
